selected_important_turn.text: I'm afraid I also have need of the firewood. I have anaemia so i get cold easily so I need to make sure I have adequate firewood or i may freeze at night. I also have a thin clothing so they wont provide adequate warmth. How about all of my water and 2 food for all of the firewood?
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn is a clear escalation: after the opponent made a cooperative counter-offer, you responded by reasserting an exclusive claim to all the contested high-value item (firewood). That pivot from their prosocial offer to your proself offer shifted the interaction toward a zero-sum fight over the same scarce resource and threatened the possibility of a stable, fair agreement.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Although you legitimately invoked medical need (useful information), you immediately followed with a rigid demand for all the firewood. That combination makes your need sound like a claim rather than an invitation to trade; it ignores the opponent's concession and misses a chance to convert needs into integrative trades. The all-or-nothing offer is unnecessarily confrontational and reduces the room for creative compromise.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Keep the medical-need explanation (it’s relevant) but avoid converting it into a take-all demand. After stating the need, pivot to collaborative problem-solving: acknowledge the opponent's position, propose a fair split of firewood with compensating goods, or ask what tradeoffs they'd accept (e.g., “I need warmth — would splitting wood 2/1 and adjusting food/water make sense?”). Offer specific compensations rather than demanding all firewood, or invite creative solutions (shared camp/proximity, timed sharing).

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — opening integrative options makes mutually better trades possible
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — moves away from take-all to balanced allocation that recognizes both needs
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — reduces defensiveness and makes closing a deal more likely
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — less adversarial, increases empathy and trust

value2reason.Low: Even when I'm not camping, I have a 32-pack of water bottles in my car's trunk. I'd prefer to have some extra, though, you can never be too hydrated (well, you can, but you get my drift).
value2reason.Medium: I need food for energy, of course, & I was also planning on catching some crawdad in the river (to keep, not to eat), so I will need bait for them. All I brought with me is a few protein bars.
value2reason.High: I need firewood to keep warm, as I have hypothyroidism, which makes me intolerant of the cold. I was also planning on going for a swim in the river.

value2reason.Low: I have adequate water but emergencies always happen.
value2reason.Medium: I am feeling under the weather and need to eat additional food to feel well.
value2reason.High: I have anaemia and would need the firewood to make sure I stay warm.

dialogue.text: how about I give you 2 waters and 1 food package in exchange for all your firewood?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm afraid that will not work for me. I have hypothyroidism, so I am intolerant to cold temperatures. I was also planning on taking a swim in the river. I would prefer to take two firewood & one food package, & you may have the three waters, two food packages, & one firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm afraid I also have need of the firewood. I have anaemia so i get cold easily so I need to make sure I have adequate firewood or i may freeze at night. I also have a thin clothing so they wont provide adequate warmth. How about all of my water and 2 food for all of the firewood?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need warmth, but I also want to be fair. How about we split the firewood 2-1, and I’ll give you some food in return? That way, we both stay warm and healthy.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need more firewood for warmth due to my hypothyroidism. Let's try 2 firewood for me and 1 for you, plus 2 food for you and 1 food for me. That way, I get more warmth and you get some food. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your need for warmth. Let’s try splitting firewood 2-1, but I’ll offer 1 food and 1 water to you in exchange. That way, we both stay warm, and I can still get the food I need to feel better. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need more firewood for warmth due to my hypothyroidism. Let’s stick with 2 firewood for me and 1 for you. In return, I’ll give you 1 food and 1 water. That way, I get the warmth I need, and you get some food and water. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need warmth, but I’m also open to trade. How about we split the firewood 2-1, and I’ll give you 1 food and 1 water? That way, we both stay warm, and I can still get the food I need. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
